product_overview: A neutral, open-source web app that presents major DeFi risk feeds side by side for each protocol, without composite scoring. It helps users compare coverage, inspect provenance, and understand methodology across protocols, feeds, and details pages.
core_goals: Browse a coverage matrix of top DeFi protocols against the available risk feeds
Inspect per-protocol governance, audits, incidents, and feed assessments with provenance
Review the risk feed registry, coverage gaps, and blockers by provider and protocol category
Read the project methodology, inclusion rationale, and provenance legend
Navigate between coverage, feeds, methodology, and protocol detail views

features.name: Coverage matrix table
features.description: A searchable, filterable, sortable matrix that shows how each protocol is covered across all risk feeds, with live TVL or volume context and per-cell coverage status.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Browse the protocol and feed matrix -> Search for a protocol by name or category -> Filter the list by protocol family -> Sort the table by coverage or TVL -> View labeled coverage states across feeds -> Hover a cell to inspect status, note, and provenance -> Open a protocol detail page from a protocol name
Navigate to / -> Browse the matrix -> Sort by TVL or volume -> Compare relative protocol size using inline bars -> Review coverage labels across all feeds

features.name: Stats header with feeds link
features.description: A summary header that surfaces high-level counts for protocols, feeds, verified cells, and tracked TVL, with a direct path into the feeds registry.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Review the summary stats header -> Select the independent risk feeds summary -> Navigate to /feeds -> Review the feed registry overview

features.name: Protocol detail page
features.description: A per-protocol detail view that shows governance facts, provenance tags, feed assessment cards, audit history, incident history, and coverage navigation for a selected protocol.
user_flows: Navigate to /protocol/aave -> Review governance facts and provenance tags -> Open section anchors for governance, feed assessments, audits, and incidents -> Read the verbatim feed assessment quotes -> Review audit and incident history -> Use previous or next protocol links to move to another protocol detail page
Navigate to /protocol/lido -> Inspect coverage summary and feed cards -> Open a not-yet-covered feed explanation -> Go to the feeds gaps section -> Return to the protocol detail page

features.name: Feeds registry page
features.description: A registry of all risk feeds with summaries, types, data-access status, coverage by protocol category, and blocker classification for what prevents broader coverage.
user_flows: Navigate to /feeds -> Review the feed registry and focus summaries -> Compare coverage counts across protocol categories -> Inspect blocker classifications and unblock paths -> Open an external provider site from a feed entry -> Return to the coverage matrix home page

features.name: Methodology page
features.description: A methodology reference that explains the project scope, the full feed registry, provenance tags, and the corrections process.
user_flows: Navigate to /methodology -> Read the scope statement and what the project does not do -> Review the full feed registry table -> Inspect the provenance tag legend -> Open supporting external references such as the charter or data layer repository

features.name: Site navigation with active state
features.description: Persistent navigation links that let users switch among the main app sections, with the current page clearly indicated.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Use the top navigation to switch to Feeds -> Observe the active state on the current page -> Switch to Methodology -> Return to the coverage matrix home page

routes.description: Coverage matrix home — 20 protocols x 14 risk feeds with stats header
Risk feed registry — per-feed summaries, coverage-by-category matrix, coverage blockers
Methodology — scope statement, feed registry table, provenance tag legend, correction process
Protocol detail page (20 static slugs, e.g. /protocol/aave, /protocol/lido, /protocol/uniswap)

features.name: Coverage matrix table
features.description: Sortable, filterable, searchable table of 20 seed protocols against 14 risk feeds; every cell labeled covered/partial/not-yet-covered; protocol family grouping; live TVL with inline bars
user_interactions: Type in "Search protocols…" input to filter rows by name or category
Click category filter chips (All, Lending, DEX / AMM, Swap Aggregator, Yield / Vault, Liquid Staking)
Click sort controls (TVL / volume, coverage, name)
Hover a coverage cell to see status, note, and provenance tooltip
Click a coverage cell to navigate to the protocol detail page feed anchor
Click a protocol name to open its detail page

features.name: Stats header with feeds link
features.description: Four stat tiles (Protocols, Independent risk feeds, Provider-verified cells, TVL tracked); the feeds tile links to /feeds
user_interactions: Click the "Independent risk feeds" tile to navigate to /feeds

features.name: Protocol detail page
features.description: Per-protocol governance facts with provenance tags and source links, verbatim feed assessment cards grouped by feed type, audit history, incident history, coverage summary strip with section anchors, prev/next protocol navigation
user_interactions: Click section anchor links (Governance, Feed assessments, Audits, Incidents)
Read verbatim DeFiScan assessment quotes on synced protocols (aave, lido, uniswap, etc.)
Click "Why?" on a not-yet-covered feed card to open /feeds#gaps
Click prev/next protocol links at the page bottom
Hover provenance tags for plain-language descriptions

features.name: Feeds registry page
features.description: Lists all 14 risk feeds with focus summary, type badge, data-access status; feed x protocol-category coverage matrix with covered/partial counts; "What blocks coverage" blockers table (provider-scope / access-gated / verification-pending)
user_interactions: Click a feed name to open the provider's external site
Read coverage counts per protocol category in the matrix
Read blocker classification and unblock path per feed in the gaps table
Click "coverage matrix" link to return home

features.name: Methodology page
features.description: What the project does and does not do (no composite scoring), full feed registry table, data provenance tag legend, corrections process
user_interactions: Read registry table and provenance legend
Click external links (charter, data layer on GitHub)

features.name: Site navigation with active state
features.description: Header nav (Coverage Matrix, Feeds, Methodology, GitHub) with active-page underline styling
user_interactions: Click nav items to switch views; active view is underlined and bold

known_limitations.issue: 17 of 20 protocol detail pages show explicit "curation pending" placeholders for governance/audits/incidents (only aave, lido, uniswap fully populated)
known_limitations.impact: Detail sections render dashed placeholder boxes rather than data — by design (M1 scope), labeled honestly

known_limitations.issue: Only DeFiScan feed data is live-synced; other 13 feeds show manual-unverified claims or assessment-pending states
known_limitations.impact: Most matrix cells are gray (not yet covered) — by design, pending provider verification

known_limitations.issue: Morpho Vaults has no DefiLlama listing
known_limitations.impact: Shows an explicit "metric pending" badge instead of TVL

known_limitations.issue: TVL/volume values are fetched server-side with hourly revalidation and a snapshot fallback
known_limitations.impact: Values can be up to 1 hour stale; a "stale" badge appears only when the live fetch failed
